reasoning: The Solomon Islands currently has no active "organized armed groups", which are required for ACLED to record "Battles". Achieving the threshold condition would require at least 11 ACLED-classified "Battles" in a single 30-day window. There is no evidence of an incipient civil war or armed insurgency that could generate this intense level of armed conflict. Adhering to the minimum probability constraints, I set my forecasts very close to the floor for all dates, incorporating a slight increase in uncertainty for the longest horizon.
